nasb.text: When the prophets, Haggai the prophet and Zechariah the son of Iddo, prophesied to the Jews who were in Judah and Jerusalem in the name of the God of Israel, who was over them,

esv.text: Now the prophets, Haggai and Zechariah the son of Iddo, prophesied to the Jews who were in Judah and Jerusalem, in the name of the God of Israel who was over them.

cnv.text: 那時，哈該先知和易多的兒子撒迦利亞先知奉以色列　神的名，向在猶大地和耶路撒冷的猶大人傳講信息。

ccb.text: 那时，先知哈该和易多的子孙撒迦利亚奉以色列上帝的名，向犹大和耶路撒冷的犹大人宣讲上帝的话。
